description: Reviewed allowlist for App Store-facing Apple entitlement files. Any entitlement added here requires a reviewer-owned justification. MAS runtime exceptions also require currentEvidence tied to files in this checkout.

com.apple.security.app-sandbox.justification: Mac App Store builds must use App Sandbox.

com.apple.security.network.client.justification: Required for AI provider API calls, Eliza Cloud API calls, push setup, and user-initiated network features.

com.apple.security.network.server.appReviewJustification: The desktop app exposes a loopback-only local gateway for app-to-agent coordination and OAuth/callback style local flows. This entitlement must not be broadened beyond that reviewed use.

com.apple.security.files.user-selected.r.justification: Required for user-selected import/export and workspace file access.

com.apple.security.files.downloads.read-.appReviewJustification: Allows user-approved import/export flows that target the Downloads folder. Keep this entitlement under review because it grants a broad scoped location.

com.apple.security.device.camera.justification: Required for user-initiated camera capture features.

com.apple.security.device.microphone.justification: Required for user-initiated voice input and audio capture features.

com.apple.security.personal-information..justification: Required for native Contacts integration paths.
Required for native EventKit calendar integration paths.

com.apple.security.automation.apple-even.appReviewJustification: Required for remaining user-approved Apple Events automation paths such as Messages and Notes. New automation targets need separate review before this justification is reused.

aps-environment.justification: MAS distribution uses the production APNs environment.

com.apple.security.app-sandbox.justification: Nested MAS binaries must remain sandboxed.

com.apple.security.inherit.justification: Nested MAS binaries inherit the parent app sandbox scope.

com.apple.security.app-sandbox.justification: Nested MAS binaries must remain sandboxed.

com.apple.security.inherit.justification: Nested MAS binaries inherit the parent app sandbox scope.

com.apple.security.cs.allow-jit.appReviewJustification: Scoped to the bundled Bun helper only. The MAS parent app, child helpers, and nested frameworks must not receive broad unsigned executable memory or library-validation exceptions.

com.apple.developer.family-controls.appReviewJustification: Required for Screen Time and website blocking features exposed through the iOS app and extension.

com.apple.security.application-groups.justification: Required to share scoped state with app extensions.

com.apple.developer.healthkit.appReviewJustification: Required for HealthKit-backed health features. Use must remain tied to explicit user consent and health data purpose strings.

com.apple.developer.healthkit.background.appReviewJustification: Required for HealthKit background delivery so user-approved health updates can refresh app state.

aps-environment.justification: Resolved by Xcode build settings for APNs.

com.apple.developer.kernel.increased-mem.appReviewJustification: Required for memory-heavy local runtime and native inference paths on supported devices. Keep this entitlement under review for App Store submission.

com.apple.developer.kernel.extended-virt.appReviewJustification: Required for large-address-space local runtime and native inference paths on supported devices. Keep this entitlement under review for App Store submission.

com.apple.security.application-groups.justification: Required to share scoped website-blocking state between the containing app and extension.
